note_text: Wound note - Abdominalwal. Meas 2.1x3.3x1.1cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 52% gran, 48% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Bergstrom notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 2.1 cm x 3.3 cm x 1.1 cm.
  Wound bed: 38% slough, 62% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Alginate dressing applied.
